title: Genie Space enhancements
body:
* **Export context as metric view**: You can now export the context from a Genie Space as a metric view to centrally define your business semantics. See [Export a Genie Agent as a metric view](/aws/en/genie/set-up#export-metric-view).
* **Iframe monitoring (Beta)**: Messages from iframe-embedded Genie One spaces are now logged in the **Monitoring** tab.
* **Compliance security profile iframe embed (Beta)**: Customers with compliance security profile enabled can now enable embedding Genie Spaces as an iframe. See [Embed a Genie Agent in an external app](/aws/en/genie/embed).

ref_links.text: Export a Genie Agent as a metric view
Embed a Genie Agent in an external app
